lines.target: There's a good programme on the television. There are always good programmes on Saturday.
lines.base: Hay (allí está) un buen programa en la televisión. Hay (allí son) siempre buenos programas los (en) sábados.
lines.pronunciation: dzérs á gud program on dzé televishén. dzér aar olueis gud programs on satédei. — 2 dzér aar olueis frends in dzé hauss. — 3 is maikél in his rum? probébli, dzé door of his rum is oupén. — 4 hiié is piité and his frend ann. — 5 dziss is há bradzé pol. — 6 hér bradzér is veri klevé. hiis én aakitekt. — 7 ies, bat his kloudz aa terriból! — 8 ies, his teildr probébli isent rich. — 9 uérs aa dchim and stiv? — 10 dzei aant hiié yet. — 11 uel, dzér stil taim. Dzei veri ruud, dzei olueis leit. — 12 klevé; probébli; oupén.

lines.target: There are always friends in the house.
lines.base: Hay (allí están) siempre amigos en casa.

lines.target: Is Michael in his room? — Probably, the door of his room is open.
lines.base: ¿Está Michael en su habitación? Probablemente, la puerta de su habitación está abierta.

lines.target: Here is Peter and his friend Anne.
lines.base: Aquí está Peter y su amiga Anne.
Este es su (de ella) hermano Paul.

lines.target: Her brother is very clever. He's an architect.
lines.base: Su (de ella) hermano es muy inteligente. (El) es (un) arquitecto.

lines.target: Yes, but his clothes are terrible!
lines.base: Sí, ¡pero su (de él) vestimenta es horrorosa!

lines.target: Yes, his tailor probably isn't rich!
lines.base: Sí, su (de él) sastre probablemente no es rico.

lines.target: Well, there's still time. They're very rude, they're always late.
lines.base: Bueno, todavía hay (allí es) tiempo. (Ellos) son muy mal educados; (ellos) llegan (están) siempre tarde.

gap_candidates.target: There's a good programme on the television. There are always good programmes on Saturday.
There are always friends in the house.
Is Michael in his room? — Probably, the door of his room is open.
Here is Peter and his friend Anne.
Her brother is very clever. He's an architect.
Yes, but his clothes are terrible!
Yes, his tailor probably isn't rich!
Well, there's still time. They're very rude, they're always late.
